---
title: "advertisement for <i>Robert Elsmere</i>"
---

## advertisement for <i>Robert Elsmere</i>

**Type:** topic

### About

At least one of the <i>MP</i>\'s readers objected to an advertisement for Mary Ward\'s novel <i>[[otherbook:631]Robert Elsmere]</i> which arrived with the magazine.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
